titleStmt.title: SII 38.342: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 342. (A.R. No. 342 of 1912.) BASNIKOṆḌA, MADANAPALLE TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT. On a slab lying in a field.

summary.p: The record begins with the meykīrtti of the above king, tiṅgaḷēr peṟuvaḷar.

Records that the mercantile corporate organization Rājādhirājap peruṅkāvi eṇḍisai nāṅku tisaiyāyirattu aññūṟṟuvar declared the village Śiṟuvaḷḷi, in Mugai-nāḍu (a sub-division) of Puṟaṉaimārāyapāḍi in Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḷa-maṇḍalam as nānādēsiyadaśamaḍi-eṟivīrappaṭṭiṉam in favour of eṟivīrar, muṉaivīrar, iḷañjiñgavīrar, koṅgavāḷar, nyāyattār, valaṅgaitāriyār and others who were serving the samaiyam (the above corporate organisation).
They also prohibited the ūrār from collecting any dues from them and gave them a charter to that effect.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tiṅkaḷerpeṟa vaḷarvaḷar is engraved below the line.vaṅkatirk ka
ṭavuṭ tolkulamviḷaṅkat to
ṉṟi malkiya vaṭaticaikkaṅkai
yun teṉṟicaiilaṅkaiyuṅ
kuṭaticai mahotaiyuṅ kuṇaticaik
kaṭāramun taṇṭārk koṇṭa tātai
taṉmaṇṭalam veṇkuṭainiḻaṟ
kiḻttaṉ kuṭainiḻaṟṟit ticai toṟu
ñ ceṅkolocci Icaikeḻu teṉna
vaṉ māṉāparaṇaṉ poṉmuṭiyāna(ā)
pparumaṇip pacuntalaiporukaḷattarin
tu veṇāṭṭaraicaic ceṇāṭṭotu
kkik kūvakattaraicaic cevakantulait
tu velaikeḻu kāntaḷurccālai kala
maṟuttaruḷittu tikeḻa jayaṅko
ṇṭacoḻaneṉṉu matikeḻu ko
virājakesaripanmarāṉa Uṭaiyā
r śrīrājādhirājadevaṟku yāṇṭu mu
ppattiraṇṭāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa
coḻamaṇṭalattu puṟaṉaimārā
yapāṭi mukaināṭṭu ciṟuvaḷḷi Elani
tanta nāṭun nakaramum nāṉāteciyum
naṭaikuṭicāttun tokkuni Enta
rājādhirājapperukāvi Eṇṭi
caināṉkuticaiyāyirattu Aiññūṟ
ṟu vaya perunāvisamaiyamum Ic
camaiyattut tiruvaṭikkup paṇi ce
yyum Eṟivirarum muṉaivirarum Iḷa
ñciṅkaviraruṅ koṅkavāḷārum pa
ṉmaiyum palaniyāyattārum
valaṅkai tariyārum pocañ ciṟa
pa
ḷiluṅkaivar ciṉai peṟ
ṟuṭaimaiyālum ciṟuva
ḷḷiyai nāṉāteciyadaśa
maṭi Eṟivirappaṭṭaṇame
ṉṟu viraśāsanañ ce
ytuivarkaḷukku nāṅkaḷ
Ivvū
riṟ koḷḷātutākavum I
pparicu viraśāsanañ ce
ytu kuṭuttom pati
ṉeṇviṣaiyattup
peruñcamaiyam paṇikkaIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 38.342 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
